pages.text: One sunny morning, <name> was playing near a big lotus pond behind her house. The water sparkled like tiny stars, and dragonflies danced in the air. Suddenly, she saw something shining between the flowers.

Out stepped a tiny elephant — no bigger than her toy bucket! Its skin glowed softly like moonlight, and its eyes twinkled. “Hello, <name>!” said the elephant in a gentle voice. “I’m Lumo, the glowing elephant. I lost my magic bell. Can you help me find it?”

<name> gasped. “Of course!” She held Lumo’s little trunk, and together they tiptoed through the rainbow garden. They looked under tulip leaves — rustle-rustle! — behind shiny rocks — clink-clink! — and near the butterfly bush.

Suddenly, <name> heard a soft ting-ting! sound. “There it is!” she said. The bell was hiding inside a blooming lotus! Lumo smiled. “You found it! Now listen…” He rang the bell — ding-ding-ding! — and magic sparkles floated everywhere.
The pond glowed, and the flowers began to sing a happy song. <name> laughed and twirled with joy. “It’s beautiful!” “Thank you, friend,” said Lumo. “You have a kind heart.”
With one last sparkle, Lumo waved goodbye and floated into the sky on a golden cloud. That night, <name> looked up and whispered, “Goodnight, Lumo.” The stars twinkled back — ting-ting!
